infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to photograph and scan documents for research.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to select photos and documents to upload for research.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used for voice note capture during research sessions.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow HistoDB to access your camera to scan documents.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow HistoDB to access your photos for uploading research material.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow HistoDB to use Face ID for biometric login.
